text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory doesn't seem to be feeling very
well, so we decide to go to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It's times like these where motivation is
crucial! I'm gonna rest like nobody's ever rested
before!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? Why am I outside? What's going on? I
don't remind waking up...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! I'm drawing some graffiti!
I'm wearing my fuzzy animal slippers outside!
And I'm filling the fountain with rubber duckies!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What the?! Everyone's running wild!

text_block_list.name: Head of the Anti-Disciplinary Committee
text_block_list.text:
Gyahahaha! Now this academy belongs to us, the
anti-disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The what?! Anti-disciplinary committee, you say?!
Are you the ones responsible for all this?

text_block_list.name: Head of the Anti-Disciplinary Committee
text_block_list.text:
That's right! This is all the work of the
anti-disciplinary committee! No one can resist the
joy of breaking the rules—just look for yourself!
The students have opened their eyes!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! I'm gonna tell the teacher I need to go
to the bathroom, but go play with a cat instead!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Eheheh. I'm gonna hide chocolate in my earrings
and eat it during class!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you doing, everyone?! I'll snap you
out of it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You there! No graffiti!
And you! Wear proper outdoor clothes!
The rubber duckies are for the dorm bathtubs
only!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... There! I've set everyone straight! Now the only person misbehaving is you—the head of the anti-disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Head of the Anti-Disciplinary Committee
text_block_list.text: Tch... Wh-why you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
HYAAAH! Disciplinary secret
technique—Lightspeed Uniform and Bag Check!

text_block_list.name: Head of the Anti-Disciplinary Committee
text_block_list.text:
Arghhh! No, my handheld! And my whoopee
cushion! Even the creepy spiky mask I was wearing
for no reason!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha! No one causes chaos on my watch! For I
am Bamboo Memory, head of the disciplinary
committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What was that?! Just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But still, that was a pretty cool dream. I
feel better than ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory returns from the infirmary
looking peppy and refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! It's like no matter how much I do, I'm not
even making a dent!

text_block_list.name: Head of the Anti-Disciplinary Committee
text_block_list.text:
Bwahahaha! It looks like you're getting tired!
Keep it up, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What the heck?!

text_block_list.name: Head of the Anti-Disciplinary Committee
text_block_list.text: Heh, that's a good look on you, head of the disciplinary committee—or should I say, former head of the disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaah! Fluffy red panda slippers?! This isn't
proper attire for the head of the disciplinary
committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hyah! Ah! S-so it was just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Even if it was just a dream... I hate feeling like all those miscreants beat me! I'm exhausted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory comes back from the infirmary...
but, unfortunately, it doesn't look like she's
feeling any better.
